body_html:
Hi Danielle,

I put together a ballpark based on 50 guests so you have something real to react to instead of trying to guess from a blank page.

Just so I understand, after looking at this, are you mostly trying to get clear on budget, menu direction, or whether it makes more sense to get on a quick call first?

🔥 Comeketo Calculator
Option 1 — Full Churrasco

2 meats, 3 sides, 1 salad

Food: $34.90 × 50 = $1,745.00

MA Tax (7%): $122.15

Service, Fuel & Admin (24%): $418.80

Service Charge: $150.00

Ballpark Total: ~$2,435.95

Option 2 — Deluxe Churrasco

3 meats, 3 sides, 1 salad

Food: $39.90 × 50 = $1,995.00

MA Tax (7%): $139.65

Service, Fuel & Admin (24%): $478.80

Service Charge: $150.00

Ballpark Total: ~$2,763.45

🍽️ Come Taste It First

If tasting makes more sense, I can save you a spot so you can experience the food before deciding.

Option 1: Sunday, May 3 at 5:30 PM
Option 2: Sunday, May 17 at 2:00 PM
Location: 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420
Code: ANDRE

Tasting Preview Tasting Registration

If a quick call is easier first, I can also make time at 10:00 AM, 11:00 AM, or 1:00 PM.

Regards,

Andre Raw
Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website

body_text:
Hi Danielle,

I put together a ballpark based on 50 guests so you have something real to react to instead of trying to guess from a blank page.

Just so I understand, after looking at this, are you mostly trying to get clear on budget, menu direction, or whether it makes more sense to get on a quick call first?

If a tasting would help more than going back and forth by email, I can also save you a spot for our next tasting dates on Sunday, May 3 at 5:30 PM or Sunday, May 17 at 2:00 PM.

-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
